objects.query: SELECT AccountSource, AnnualRevenue, BillingCity, BillingCountry, BillingPostalCode, BillingState, BillingStreet,ChannelProgramLevelName, ChannelProgramName, CurrencyIsoCode, Description, Fax, Id, Industry, MasterRecordId, Name, NumberOfEmployees, ParentId, Phone, PhotoUrl, ShippingCity, ShippingCountry, ShippingPostalCode, ShippingState, ShippingStreet, Type, Website FROM Account
SELECT AccountId, FirstName, LastName, Name FROM Contact

SELECT AccountId, Account.Name, AddTaxIdentificationDetails, BillDayOfMonth, BillingResumptionDate, BillingSuspensionDate, BillToContactId, BillToContact.Name, CurrencyIsoCode, DeliveryTerms, DoesSkipAutomaticPayments, EmailTemplateId, EmailTemplate.Name, InvoiceDocumentTemplateId, InvoiceDocumentTemplate.Name, IsDefaultBillingProfile, Name, PaymentTermId, PaymentTerm.Name, PrimaryBillAddrCity, PrimaryBillAddrCountry, PrimaryBillAddrGeocodeAccuracy, PrimaryBillAddrPostalCode, PrimaryBillAddrState, PrimaryBillAddrStreet, SavedPaymentMethodId, SavedPaymentMethod.Name, ShouldAttachInvoiceDocToEmail, TaxExemptionExpirationDate, TaxExemptionNumber, TaxExemptionStatus, TaxIdentificationNumber FROM BillingAccount
